name: Recap email draft
description: Generates a ready-to-send recap email summarizing the meeting. Paste into your email client.

sections.title: Subject line
sections.instruction: One line. Format: 'Recap: <meeting topic> — <date>'. Keep under 60 chars.

sections.title: Email body
sections.instruction: Write a complete recap email body in first person plural ('we'). Open with thanks for the time. Then 3 sections: 'What we discussed' (3-5 bullets), 'Decisions made' (bullets, omit section if none), 'Next steps' (bullets with owner + when). Close with offer to clarify. Sign off 'Best,'. Do not include placeholders like [Your name] — leave the signature blank for the user to fill. Plain text, no markdown headers in the email body itself (use bold + bullets only).

sections.title: To / CC suggestions
sections.instruction: List attendees by email (if known) split into 'To:' (active participants who owe a follow-up) and 'CC:' (observers / stakeholders).
